nasb.text: “Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the sons of Israel, and the Levites shall be Mine.

esv.text: “Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the people of Israel, and the Levites shall be mine.

cnv.text: “這樣，你要把利未人從以色列人中分別出來，利未人就要歸我。

ccb.text: 这样，你就把利未人从其他以色列人中分别出来，使他们归给我。
